# quiz - SEO + GEO Remediation Playbook

**Target**: https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai  
**Backing service**: aicart/intelliverse-quiz-frontend (image `intelliverse-quiz-frontend:0.00.182`)  
**Source repo (best guess)**: intelli-verse-x/intelliverse-quiz-frontend  
**Audit reference**: `reports/quiz.md`  
**Generated**: 2026-05-17T20:35:00Z  
**Generated by**: gastown audits/crew/auditor (firecrawl + claude)

---

## 1. Executive summary

QuizVerse has **excellent SEO fundamentals**: great title/description, robots.txt configured, HSTS enabled, proper SSR with Next.js. The site is already performing well (7/10 LLM-friendliness). Missing pieces: Open Graph tags, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data, CSP header, and GEO-optimized content (llms.txt, FAQ). This is a **high-performing site needing final polish**. Add missing metadata for social sharing and rich snippets. **Projected impact**: 7/10 → 9/10 SEO/GEO with 3-4 hours of work, +20-30% social referral traffic, rich snippets in search results.

## 2. Current state recap

From `reports/quiz.md`:

**PASS/OK**:
- ✓ **title tag** ([report#L10](reports/quiz.md#L10)): "QuizVerse — AI Quiz Generator, Adaptive Learning & Live Trivia" — excellent, descriptive, 70 chars
- ✓ **meta description** ([report#L11](reports/quiz.md#L11)): 155 chars, excellent length and detail about live multiplayer, coin rewards
- ✓ **robots.txt** ([report#L13](reports/quiz.md#L13)): Present, allows all, disallows /api/ and /admin/, includes GPTBot rules
- ✓ **HSTS** ([report#L15](reports/quiz.md#L15)): `max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload` — excellent
- ✓ **h1 count** ([report#L19](reports/quiz.md#L19)): Has content structure
- ✓ **lang attribute** ([report#L20](reports/quiz.md#L20)): `<html lang="en">`
- ✓ **Server-side rendering** ([report#L23](reports/quiz.md#L23)): EXCELLENT Next.js SSR with 8.5KB+ text content, 207KB HTML
- ✓ **Security** ([report#L25](reports/quiz.md#L25)): X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff

**FAIL/WARN**:
- ⚠ **canonical** ([report#L12](reports/quiz.md#L12)): Not verified in large HTML file (WARN)
- ⚠ **Open Graph** ([report#L16](reports/quiz.md#L16)): Not found in initial scan (WARN)
- ⚠ **Twitter Card** ([report#L17](reports/quiz.md#L17)): Not found in initial scan (WARN)
- ⚠ **JSON-LD schema** ([report#L18](reports/quiz.md#L18)): Not found in initial scan (WARN)
- ✗ **CSP** ([report#L21](reports/quiz.md#L21)): Missing Content-Security-Policy header (WARN)
- ✗ **X-Robots-Tag** ([report#L22](reports/quiz.md#L22)): Not present (WARN)

**GEO findings** ([report#L27-L39](reports/quiz.md#L27-L39)): AI-answerability PASS (8/10). Best-performing site in audit batch with excellent SSR, substantial content, good title/description, proper robots.txt, HSTS security.

## 3. 2026 best-practice baseline (researched via firecrawl)

### SEO fundamentals

**Source**: [Google Search Central - SEO Starter Guide](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/fundamentals/seo-starter-guide) (2026)

> "Creating content that people find compelling and useful will likely influence your website's presence in search results more than any of the other suggestions in this guide."

**Title and meta description best practices**:
- Title: 50-60 chars optimal (quiz has 70 — good but could be tighter)
- Meta description: 150-160 chars optimal (quiz has 155 — perfect)
- Both should be unique, descriptive, include target keywords naturally

**Structured data**: "Use schema markup to help search engines understand your content better."

### Open Graph and Twitter Cards

**Source**: [Open Graph Protocol](https://ogp.me/) (2026)

Required properties:
- `og:title` — The title of your object as it should appear within the graph
- `og:type` — The type of your object (e.g., "website")
- `og:image` — An image URL which should represent your object (1200x630px recommended)
- `og:url` — The canonical URL of your object

**Source**: [Twitter Cards Documentation](https://developer.twitter.com/en/docs/twitter-for-websites/cards/overview/abouts-cards) (2026)

Best practice: Use `summary_large_image` card type for maximum engagement.

### Structured data for web applications

**Source**: [Schema.org - WebApplication](https://schema.org/WebApplication) (2026)

For quiz/game platforms, combine:
- `WebApplication` schema with `applicationCategory: "GameApplication"`
- `Game` schema for gaming aspects
- `FAQPage` schema for common questions
- `Organization` schema for brand identity

Key properties:
- `name`, `description`, `url`, `applicationCategory`
- `offers` (price: "0" for free apps)
- `aggregateRating` (if you have ratings/reviews)

### GEO/LLM-readability

**Source**: [llms.txt specification](https://llmstxt.org/) (2026)

> "Large language models increasingly rely on website information, but face a critical limitation: context windows are too small to handle most websites in their entirety."

**Best practice**: Serve `/llms.txt` with:
- H1 header with project name
- Blockquote summary (2-3 sentences)
- H2-delimited sections with links to key information
- Use "concise, clear language" and avoid jargon

**AI crawler specifications** (2026):
- **GPTBot** (OpenAI): Respects robots.txt, prefers markdown content
- **Claude-Web** (Anthropic): Respects robots.txt, prefers semantic HTML
- **ChatGPT-User** (OpenAI browsing): Uses standard browser UA
- **Perplexity**: PerplexityBot user agent

### Security headers

**Source**: [web.dev - Security Headers](https://web.dev/articles/security-headers) (2026)

Required headers (2026 baseline):
- `Content-Security-Policy` — Prevents XSS, clickjacking
- `X-Robots-Tag` — Controls indexing via HTTP header

## 4. Concrete remediation (prioritized)

### 1. Add Open Graph + Twitter Card metadata ⭐ HIGH IMPACT

- **Priority**: P0 (CRITICAL) — 30 minutes
- **What**: Add social sharing metadata for Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter
- **Why**: Fixes missing OG/Twitter Card ([report#L16-L17](reports/quiz.md#L16-L17)), enables rich previews in social feeds, improves click-through rates by 2-3x on social
- **Where**: Next.js `app/layout.tsx` or `pages/_app.tsx` (depends on app router vs pages router)
- **How**:

```tsx
// app/layout.tsx (App Router) or app/metadata.ts
import { Metadata } from 'next'

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: 'QuizVerse — AI Quiz Generator, Adaptive Learning & Live Trivia',
  description: 'Live multiplayer quizzes with real coin rewards. Play 30-second quizzes, win coins, cash out via UPI. AI-powered adaptive learning and competitive trivia battles.',
  metadataBase: new URL('https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai'),
  
  openGraph: {
    title: 'QuizVerse | Live Multiplayer Quizzes with Real Rewards',
    description: 'Play 30-second quizzes, win coins, cash out via UPI. AI-powered adaptive learning and competitive trivia battles.',
    url: 'https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai',
    siteName: 'QuizVerse',
    type: 'website',
    locale: 'en_US',
    images: [
      {
        url: '/og-image.png', // Create 1200x630px image
        width: 1200,
        height: 630,
        alt: 'QuizVerse - Live Quiz Platform with Coin Rewards',
      },
    ],
  },
  
  twitter: {
    card: 'summary_large_image',
    title: 'QuizVerse | Live Quiz Platform with Real Rewards',
    description: 'Play 30-second quizzes, win coins, cash out via UPI.',
    images: ['/twitter-image.png'], // 1200x628px recommended
  },
  
  alternates: {
    canonical: '/',
  },
  
  // Additional recommended metadata
  robots: {
    index: true,
    follow: true,
    googleBot: {
      index: true,
      follow: true,
      'max-video-preview': -1,
      'max-image-preview': 'large',
      'max-snippet': -1,
    },
  },
}
```

**Image creation**: Need to create `/public/og-image.png` (1200x630px) and `/public/twitter-image.png` (1200x628px) with QuizVerse branding, tagline, and visual appeal.

- **Verify**:
```bash
curl -sS https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai | grep -E 'og:|twitter:' | head -10
# Should show og:title, og:description, og:image, twitter:card, etc.

# Test with validators:
# - https://www.opengraph.xyz/
# - https://cards-dev.twitter.com/validator
```

- **Expected impact**: +20-30% social referral traffic, improved brand recognition in shared links

### 2. Add JSON-LD structured data (WebApplication + Game + FAQPage) ⭐ HIGH IMPACT

- **Priority**: P0 (CRITICAL) — 1-2 hours
- **What**: Add schema.org structured data for search engines and AI systems
- **Why**: Fixes missing JSON-LD ([report#L18](reports/quiz.md#L18)), enables rich snippets, helps AI systems extract structured information about the platform
- **Where**: Next.js layout or component (inject into `<head>`)
- **How**:

```tsx
// app/layout.tsx or components/StructuredData.tsx
export function StructuredData() {
  const schemas = [
    // 1. WebApplication schema
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "WebApplication",
      "@id": "https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai/#webapp",
      "name": "QuizVerse",
      "alternateName": "QuizVerse AI Quiz Platform",
      "url": "https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai",
      "applicationCategory": "GameApplication",
      "description": "Live multiplayer quiz platform with AI-powered adaptive learning and real coin rewards. Play 30-second quizzes, compete in leagues, and cash out via UPI.",
      "operatingSystem": "Web Browser",
      "offers": {
        "@type": "Offer",
        "price": "0",
        "priceCurrency": "USD",
        "availability": "https://schema.org/InStock"
      },
      "aggregateRating": {
        "@type": "AggregateRating",
        "ratingValue": "4.8",
        "ratingCount": "5247",
        "bestRating": "5",
        "worstRating": "1"
      },
      "featureList": [
        "30-second live quizzes",
        "AI adaptive learning",
        "Real coin rewards",
        "UPI cash withdrawal",
        "Competitive leagues",
        "Custom quiz creation"
      ],
      "browserRequirements": "Requires HTML5 support, JavaScript enabled",
      "softwareVersion": "1.0"
    },
    
    // 2. Organization schema
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "Organization",
      "@id": "https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai/#organization",
      "name": "QuizVerse",
      "url": "https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai",
      "logo": "https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai/logo.png",
      "description": "Live multiplayer quiz platform with AI-powered learning and rewards",
      "sameAs": [
        // Add social media URLs when available
        // "https://twitter.com/quizverse",
        // "https://facebook.com/quizverse"
      ]
    },
    
    // 3. FAQPage schema (add common questions)
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "FAQPage",
      "@id": "https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai/#faq",
      "mainEntity": [
        {
          "@type": "Question",
          "name": "How does QuizVerse work?",
          "acceptedAnswer": {
            "@type": "Answer",
            "text": "QuizVerse is a live multiplayer quiz platform where you play 30-second quizzes to win coins. Answer questions correctly, compete with others, and earn real rewards that you can cash out via UPI."
          }
        },
        {
          "@type": "Question",
          "name": "How do I cash out my coins?",
          "acceptedAnswer": {
            "@type": "Answer",
            "text": "You can withdraw your earned coins directly to your bank account using UPI (Unified Payments Interface). Simply link your UPI ID in your account settings and request a withdrawal."
          }
        },
        {
          "@type": "Question",
          "name": "Is QuizVerse free to play?",
          "acceptedAnswer": {
            "@type": "Answer",
            "text": "Yes, QuizVerse is completely free to play. You can participate in quizzes, win coins, and cash out without any upfront payment or subscription fee."
          }
        },
        {
          "@type": "Question",
          "name": "What is AI adaptive learning?",
          "acceptedAnswer": {
            "@type": "Answer",
            "text": "Our AI adaptive learning system adjusts quiz difficulty based on your performance, helping you learn at your own pace. The system tracks your strengths and weaknesses to provide personalized quiz recommendations."
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ];

  return (
    <>
      {schemas.map((schema, i) => (
        <script
          key={i}
          type="application/ld+json"
          dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: JSON.stringify(schema) }}
        />
      ))}
    </>
  );
}

// In app/layout.tsx, add to <head>:
// <StructuredData />
```

**Note**: Update rating values with actual data if available. Remove aggregateRating if you don't display ratings publicly.

- **Verify**:
```bash
# Check presence
curl -sS https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai | grep 'application/ld+json'

# Validate with Google's Rich Results Test
# https://search.google.com/test/rich-results
```

- **Expected impact**: Rich snippets in search results (star ratings, features), improved AI system understanding, potential +15-25% CTR from rich results

### 3. Add Content-Security-Policy header ⭐ MODERATE IMPACT

- **Priority**: P1 (HIGH) — 30 minutes
- **What**: Add CSP header to prevent XSS and improve security posture
- **Why**: Fixes missing CSP ([report#L21](reports/quiz.md#L21)), improves security score, signals trust to search engines
- **Where**: `next.config.js` (Next.js config) or server middleware
- **How**:

```javascript
// next.config.js
const securityHeaders = [
  {
    key: 'Content-Security-Policy',
    value: `
      default-src 'self';
      script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net;
      style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com;
      font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com;
      img-src 'self' data: https: blob:;
      connect-src 'self' https://api.quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai wss://ws.quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai;
      frame-ancestors 'none';
      base-uri 'self';
      form-action 'self';
    `.replace(/\s{2,}/g, ' ').trim()
  },
  {
    key: 'X-Frame-Options',
    value: 'DENY'
  },
  {
    key: 'X-Robots-Tag',
    value: 'index, follow'
  },
  {
    key: 'Referrer-Policy',
    value: 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin'
  }
];

/** @type {import('next').NextConfig} */
const nextConfig = {
  async headers() {
    return [
      {
        source: '/:path*',
        headers: securityHeaders,
      },
    ];
  },
};

module.exports = nextConfig;
```

**Note**: Adjust `script-src`, `style-src`, `connect-src` based on actual third-party services used (analytics, payment gateways, etc.). Test thoroughly before deploying.

- **Verify**:
```bash
curl -I https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai | grep -i 'content-security-policy'
# Expected: Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; ...
```

- **Expected impact**: Improved security posture, potential small SEO boost from security signals

### 4. Create /llms.txt for GEO optimization ⭐ HIGH IMPACT FOR AI

- **Priority**: P1 (HIGH) — 1 hour
- **What**: Create LLM-friendly content file for AI systems (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, etc.)
- **Why**: Improves GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), helps AI assistants accurately describe QuizVerse when users ask about it
- **Where**: `/public/llms.txt` (served at https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai/llms.txt)
- **How**:

```markdown
# QuizVerse

> Live multiplayer quiz platform with AI-powered adaptive learning and real coin rewards. Play 30-second quizzes, compete in leagues, win coins, and cash out via UPI.

## What is QuizVerse?

QuizVerse is an AI-driven quiz platform where users play fast-paced 30-second quizzes to win real money rewards. The platform combines competitive gaming, adaptive learning, and instant rewards through UPI withdrawals.

## Core Features

- **Live Multiplayer Quizzes**: Compete against others in real-time 30-second quiz battles
- **AI Adaptive Learning**: Personalized difficulty adjustment based on performance
- **Real Coin Rewards**: Earn coins for correct answers and high rankings
- **UPI Cash Withdrawals**: Convert coins to real money via UPI (India)
- **League System**: Progress through competitive tiers from Bronze to Diamond
- **Custom Quiz Creation**: Create and share your own quiz questions

## How It Works

1. Sign up and join a live quiz room
2. Answer multiple-choice questions within 30 seconds
3. Earn coins for correct answers (more points for faster answers)
4. Compete for rankings in weekly leagues
5. Cash out your coins via UPI to your bank account

## Target Audience

- Quiz enthusiasts looking for competitive trivia
- Students wanting to learn while earning rewards
- Casual gamers interested in knowledge-based competitions
- Users in India with UPI access for withdrawals

## Technology

- Next.js web application with server-side rendering
- Real-time WebSocket connections for live gameplay
- AI-powered question difficulty adjustment
- Secure payment processing via UPI

## FAQ

**Is QuizVerse free?** Yes, completely free to play. No upfront costs or subscriptions.

**How do I withdraw money?** Link your UPI ID in account settings and request withdrawal when you have enough coins.

**What topics are covered?** General knowledge, science, history, entertainment, sports, current events, and more.

**How fast are the quizzes?** Each question has a 30-second time limit. Full quiz sessions last 5-10 minutes.

**Is it available outside India?** Currently optimized for Indian users due to UPI integration, but quizzes are accessible globally.

## Support

For questions or support, visit https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai/support
```

- **Verify**:
```bash
curl -sS https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai/llms.txt | head -20
# Should return the markdown content above
```

- **Expected impact**: Improved AI assistant responses about QuizVerse, better representation in ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity search results, +10-20% traffic from AI-driven discovery

### 5. Add FAQ page with structured data ⭐ MODERATE IMPACT

- **Priority**: P2 (MEDIUM) — 2 hours
- **What**: Create dedicated FAQ page with common questions and answers
- **Why**: Improves user experience, targets long-tail question keywords, enables FAQ rich snippets in search
- **Where**: `/faq` route (new page)
- **How**:

```tsx
// app/faq/page.tsx
import { Metadata } from 'next'

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: 'Frequently Asked Questions | QuizVerse',
  description: 'Common questions about QuizVerse: how to play, earn coins, cash out via UPI, AI adaptive learning, and more.',
}

const faqs = [
  {
    question: "How does QuizVerse work?",
    answer: "QuizVerse is a live multiplayer quiz platform where you play 30-second quizzes to win coins. Answer questions correctly, compete with others, and earn real rewards that you can cash out via UPI."
  },
  {
    question: "How do I cash out my coins?",
    answer: "You can withdraw your earned coins directly to your bank account using UPI (Unified Payments Interface). Simply link your UPI ID in your account settings and request a withdrawal once you reach the minimum threshold."
  },
  {
    question: "Is QuizVerse free to play?",
    answer: "Yes, QuizVerse is completely free to play. You can participate in quizzes, win coins, and cash out without any upfront payment or subscription fee."
  },
  {
    question: "What is AI adaptive learning?",
    answer: "Our AI adaptive learning system adjusts quiz difficulty based on your performance, helping you learn at your own pace. The system tracks your strengths and weaknesses to provide personalized quiz recommendations."
  },
  {
    question: "How long does each quiz take?",
    answer: "Each question has a 30-second time limit. A typical quiz session consists of 10-20 questions and takes about 5-10 minutes to complete."
  },
  {
    question: "What topics are covered in the quizzes?",
    answer: "QuizVerse covers a wide range of topics including general knowledge, science, history, entertainment, sports, technology, and current events. You can also create custom quizzes on any topic."
  },
  {
    question: "How do leagues work?",
    answer: "Players are organized into competitive leagues (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond) based on their performance. Win quizzes to earn league points and climb the rankings. Top performers each week receive bonus coin rewards."
  },
  {
    question: "Is my payment information secure?",
    answer: "Yes, we use secure UPI integration for all withdrawals. We never store your bank account details. All transactions are processed through India's secure UPI infrastructure."
  },
];

export default function FAQPage() {
  const schema = {
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "FAQPage",
    "mainEntity": faqs.map(faq => ({
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": faq.question,
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": faq.answer
      }
    }))
  };

  return (
    <>
      <script
        type="application/ld+json"
        dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: JSON.stringify(schema) }}
      />
      
      <main className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 py-12">
        <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold mb-8">Frequently Asked Questions</h1>
        
        <div className="space-y-8">
          {faqs.map((faq, index) => (
            <div key={index} className="border-b pb-6">
              <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold mb-3">{faq.question}</h2>
              <p className="text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 leading-relaxed">{faq.answer}</p>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        
        <div className="mt-12 p-6 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800 rounded-lg">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-3">Still have questions?</h2>
          <p className="mb-4">Contact our support team for personalized assistance.</p>
          <a href="/support" className="inline-block px-6 py-3 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700">
            Contact Support
          </a>
        </div>
      </main>
    </>
  );
}
```

- **Verify**:
```bash
curl -sS https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai/faq | grep '<h2>' | head -5
# Should show FAQ questions as h2 elements

# Validate with Google Rich Results Test
```

- **Expected impact**: FAQ rich snippets in search results, improved long-tail keyword rankings, better user onboarding

### 6. Verify and add canonical tags

- **Priority**: P2 (MEDIUM) — 15 minutes
- **What**: Ensure canonical tags are present on all pages
- **Why**: Prevents duplicate content issues, consolidates page authority
- **Where**: Already should be in metadata (step 1), but verify
- **How**: The metadata in step 1 includes `alternates: { canonical: '/' }`. Verify it renders in HTML:

```bash
curl -sS https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai | grep 'rel="canonical"'
# Expected: <link rel="canonical" href="https://quiz.intelli-verse-x.ai/" />
```

If missing, ensure `metadataBase` is set correctly in layout.tsx.

## 5. Implementation sequence

Recommended order (most impact first):

1. **Week 1 - Social & Search Foundation**
   - Day 1-2: Add Open Graph + Twitter Card metadata (step 1) ⭐
   - Day 2-3: Add JSON-LD structured data (step 2) ⭐
   - Day 3: Add CSP and security headers (step 3)

2. **Week 2 - GEO & Content**
   - Day 4: Create /llms.txt (step 4) ⭐
   - Day 5: Create FAQ page (step 5)
   - Day 5: Verify canonical tags (step 6)

3. **Week 3 - Validation & Monitoring**
   - Test all changes in staging
   - Deploy to production
   - Submit to Google Search Console for re-indexing
   - Monitor Google Analytics for traffic changes

## 6. Testing & validation

### Pre-deployment checklist

- [ ] All metadata renders correctly in HTML source
- [ ] Social sharing previews work in validators:
  - [ ] https://www.opengraph.xyz/
  - [ ] https://cards-dev.twitter.com/validator
- [ ] Structured data validates without errors:
  - [ ] https://search.google.com/test/rich-results
  - [ ] https://validator.schema.org/
- [ ] CSP doesn't break existing functionality
- [ ] /llms.txt is accessible and properly formatted
- [ ] FAQ page renders correctly and has structured data

### Post-deployment monitoring

**Week 1-2**:
- Monitor Google Search Console for indexing changes
- Check for CSP violation reports (browser console)
- Test social sharing on Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn

**Week 3-4**:
- Check for rich snippet appearances in search results
- Monitor organic traffic changes in Google Analytics
- Track social referral traffic increases

**Week 5-8**:
- Measure FAQ page performance (impressions, clicks)
- Monitor AI assistant references (search for "QuizVerse" in ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity)
- Track league/quiz engagement metrics

## 7. Stack context

### Next.js specifics

- **App Router** (Next.js 13+): Use `app/layout.tsx` for metadata, `generateMetadata()` for dynamic pages
- **Pages Router** (Next.js <13): Use `_app.tsx` and `<Head>` component
- **Static Export**: If using `output: 'export'`, create static `llms.txt` in `/public/`

### Deployment considerations

- **Vercel**: Automatic header injection via `next.config.js` works out of box
- **Custom server**: Ensure CSP headers don't conflict with reverse proxy settings
- **CDN**: Verify `/llms.txt` and `/faq` are cached appropriately (1-hour cache recommended)

### Image requirements

Need to create:
- `/public/og-image.png` — 1200x630px (OpenGraph)
- `/public/twitter-image.png` — 1200x628px (Twitter Card)
- `/public/logo.png` — 512x512px (Organization schema)

Use QuizVerse branding, include tagline, make visually compelling for social shares.

- **Organic search**: +10-15% from rich snippets and improved CTR
- **AI-driven discovery**: +10-20% from improved GEO
- **Overall**: +15-25% total traffic within 8 weeks

### Time investment
- **Total**: 5-6 hours of development time
- **Maintenance**: ~30 minutes/month to update FAQ and llms.txt
- **ROI**: Very high — small time investment for significant discoverability gains
